rejection_rules_applied.keyword_filter: REJECT: tech, technology, developer, engineering, software | ACCEPT: strategy, policy, research, planning, design, operations, sustainability, climate
rejection_rules_applied.stale_job_threshold: 30 days for general, 90 days for government

removed_jobs_detail.title: Executive Director, Technology Strategy
removed_jobs_detail.details: REJECT: Contains 'Technology Strategy' and 'digital transformation' + 'Agile/DevOps' - too tech-focused despite strategy title

removed_jobs_detail.title: Director of Technical Strategy
removed_jobs_detail.details: REJECT: Contains 'Technical Strategy' and 'technology policy, digital governance' - too tech-focused

removed_jobs_detail.title: Product & Project Development Lead
removed_jobs_detail.details: REJECT: Contains 'computational design' and 'emerging technology' - tech/engineering-focused company

removed_jobs_detail.title: Technology Product Strategist
removed_jobs_detail.details: REJECT: Contains 'Technology Product' and 'technology investment' - too tech-focused despite strategy title

removed_jobs_detail.title: Senior PM, Growth & Program Operations
removed_jobs_detail.details: REJECT: Civic-tech platform - lacks specific policy/research/strategy clarity

removed_jobs_detail.title: Interior Design Leader – Workplace
removed_jobs_detail.details: REJECT: Design-focused without policy/strategy/research component - pure interior design

removed_jobs_detail.title: Director, Research & Policy
removed_jobs_detail.details: Posted 2025-12-24 (99 days old as of 2026-04-03) - exceeds 90-day threshold for government/nonprofit

removed_jobs_detail.title: Policy Associate
removed_jobs_detail.details: Posted 2026-02-15 (47 days old) - acceptable age but removed due to conflict (see details)

notes.methodology: Validation applied strict keyword filtering to focus on strategy/policy/research/operations/design roles while rejecting pure tech/engineering roles. URL validation checked accessibility. Stale job removal targeted postings >90 days for government and >30 days for others.
notes.top_opportunities: NYC Mayor's Office positions (highest scores: 95+) and policy-focused roles at established nonprofits (Nonprofit New York, NRDC, EDF) represent strongest matches for Ashrita's background
notes.sector_breakdown: Government (10 roles), Consulting (8), Climate/Sustainability (8), Real Estate/Design (5), Nonprofit (4), Policy/Research (2)
